passives.name: Highborn
passives.description: Increases your experience gain with the Destruction Staff skill line by 15%. Increases your experience gained by 1%.

passives.name: Spell Recharge
passives.description: When you activate an ability, you restore 625 Magicka or Stamina, based on whichever is lowest. This effect can occur once every 6 seconds. When you are using an ability with a channel or cast time, you take 5% less damage.

passives.name: Elemental Talent
passives.description: Increases your Weapon and Spell Damage by 258.
